title: AriaCast Metadata Object
description: The track metadata payload. Both camelCase (Android) and snake_case (server broadcast) key names MUST be accepted by all implementations.

artwork_url.description: Artwork image URL (snake_case variant, preferred in server broadcasts).

artworkUrl.description: Artwork image URL (camelCase variant, used by Android Sender).

durationMs.description: Track duration in milliseconds (camelCase variant, used by Android Sender).

position_ms.description: Current playback position in milliseconds (snake_case variant).

positionMs.description: Current playback position in milliseconds (camelCase variant, used by Android Sender).

is_playing.description: Whether playback is currently active (snake_case variant).

isPlaying.description: Whether playback is currently active (camelCase variant, used by Android Sender).
